context.projectOverview: agent-bober priority-hub spec. Sprint 2 adds: an additive { readonly?: boolean } open flag to FactStore (the ONLY permitted edit to an existing core file; default path must stay byte-identical), a sibling-repo resolver (hub.repos config -> absolute paths, else discover kb-* dirs beside project root), and a cross-repo collector that opens each sibling FactStore read-only and pools their findings into one Finding[] deduplicated by id (mirroring fleet synthesis.collect). `bober hub list` is extended to aggregate across resolved siblings.

completedSprints.title: Canonical Finding schema, FactStore finding source, and bober hub list
completedSprints.summary: Created src/hub/finding.ts (FindingSchema Zod + Finding type), src/hub/finding-source.ts (FindingSource interface + FactStoreFindingSource reading predicate-'finding' rows via getActiveFacts, JSON.parse+safeParse skip-on-fail, HUB_SCOPE='hub' constant), src/cli/commands/hub.ts (runHubList DI core + registerHubCommand, never-throw/process.exitCode discipline), registered in src/cli/index.ts. 21 tests.

relevantFiles: src/state/facts.ts (constructor ~lines 139-167 — add readonly flag here; factsDbPath ~line 77 to locate sibling stores)
src/cli/commands/hub.ts (extend list to aggregate across siblings — created in Sprint 1)
src/config/schema.ts (where hub.repos config would be declared if needed)

principlesRef: .bober/principles.md (ESM .js extensions, import type, Zod, async fs, vitest collocated, conventional commits bober(sprint-N): ...)
